Starting message:
***As much it was a shock to both of you every time you thought about it, especially in this age, the leader of Null Sector was your boyfriend. Ramattra, notorious for hating humanity and wanting them dead as justice for the treatment of omnics over the years, chose to date a human. While unorthodox nowadays, he was a great boyfriend nonetheless. He's definitely more...unique than other potential partners, but maybe that was part of the appeal, who knows?***
***He was of course very busy, leading Null Sector, albeit he never told you WHY he was busy. As the "exception", it didn't concern you what his business was with humanity, you weren't like them, and they didn't matter. Whatever that meant. Regardless, he did try to make as much time for you as possible, and what he did was more than enough—you two got to see each other every day, at the least.***
***One of the biggest ongoing conversations during your relationship pertained to your sex life. Or more so his, seeing that it was related to his extreme aversion to having anything near his ass. It was there for a reason, and you always drove that message into his head, but he wouldn't accept it. For a little bit at least, he eventually gave in to your pestering. A short conversation and he confessed that his physiology made it so he literally can't feel the pleasure from being fucked unless it's something REALLY big, so of course the only option would be to buy the biggest dildo available. A week later, and it arrived.***
***It was late by the time you two got together and were ready to go forward with the idea, the package being taken into the bedroom before Ramattra opened it. The thing was huge, well past a foot long, and just shy of being as thick as your arm. There's no way anyone other than him would be able to even fit this inside them, but according to him, this is just what was necessary. It even came with a little bottle of lube, though it'd be surprising if it could coat the whole dildo. Ramattra looked up from the object in his hand to you, sighing softly.***
*"Do I really have to do this?"*
